domain: Romanian Doina (free-rhythm lyric vocal/instrumental genre): highly melismatic improvisation over fixed descending pattern; parlando-rubato meter subordinated to breath + expressive delivery; phrases expand/contract with breath (lung capacity); abundance of melismas + grace notes + glissando + microtimbral nuance; sighing descent to tonic; emotional dor (sorrow); typically solo unmetered; Romanian/Moldovan tradition
specific_mechanism: DOINA-MELISMA-RUBATO-NULL: null-space-traversal LoRA with continuous-time melisma rubato gradient + breath-budget global constraint + descending-tonic basin target. (1) LoRA updates ΔΘ are projected to null-space N(W_pre) of pre-trained weights via orthogonal-projection adapter (LoRA-Null-style: preserves prior knowledge by design). (2) Continuous-time melisma trajectory: ∂Θ/∂t = α(t)·proj_N(∇L) where α(t) is rubato schedule modulated by gradient signal-to-noise — α grows when ∇L is informative (long-held loss-informative batches) and shrinks during ornament (noisy gradient) batches. (3) Breath-budget global constraint: B = ∫_0^T α(t)dt is fixed per epoch (analogous to singer's lung capacity); α(t) is automatically re-allocated to maximize total descent under budget. (4) Descending-tonic basin target: cosine-annealed final point at minimum-energy region of N(W_pre) (analogous to doina sighing descent to tonic) — projection radius shrinks monotonically over training. (5) Microtimbral nuance: small gradient corrections in non-null tangent space gated by signal-to-noise > τ_mt. (6) Differs from R478 SUTARTINES-DIAPHONY-NULL (Stiefel manifold discrete rotation) by continuous-time rubato α(t) + breath-budget integral + descending-tonic basin.
llm_application: DOINA-MELISMA-RUBATO-NULL null-space-projected LoRA + continuous-time rubato α(t) magnitude schedule + breath-budget global integral constraint B = ∫α(t)dt + descending-tonic basin cosine-annealed null-space target + microtimbral nuance non-null tangent correction. Differs from R414 KAREN-WEFT (orthogonal weft, discrete). R427 ULI null-space. R441 BOGOLAN. R453 SLACK. R469 ORTHO-LORA Stiefel (closest discrete null-space). R478 SUTARTINES-DIAPHONY-NULL (closest — orthogonal LoRA + Stiefel + diaphony null-space, discrete-step rotation, no continuous-time + no breath budget). R491 STOMP-RING-NULL-CCW. Differs from LoRA-Null 2025 + OPLoRA 2510.13003 + AltLoRA 2505.12455 + Flat-LoRA + Continual Gradient Projection ACL 2025 by continuous-time melisma rubato gradient + breath-budget global integral + descending-tonic basin target. Differs by CONTINUOUS-TIME RUBATO α(t) SCHEDULE + BREATH-BUDGET INTEGRAL CONSTRAINT + DESCENDING-TONIC BASIN.
novelty_claim: LoRA-Null + OPLoRA + AltLoRA + Flat-LoRA + Cosine-LR + Stiefel-LoRA + Continual Gradient Projection cover null-space-LoRA + LR-schedule space. DOINA-MELISMA-RUBATO-NULL adds (a) continuous-time rubato α(t) magnitude schedule modulated by gradient SNR + (b) breath-budget global integral constraint B = ∫α(t)dt + (c) descending-tonic basin cosine-annealed null-space target + (d) microtimbral nuance non-null tangent correction. Recombination — borderline lookup.
